title: Straame Double Step Stool for Kids, Non-Slip 2 Step Stool for Toddlers with Built-in Handles, Step Stool for Potty Training, Bathroom and Kitchen, Sturdy and Practical Design (White)
features: DOUBLE STEP STOOL: A practical step stool with two steps suitable for the whole family. Give your kids some independence while going to the toilet and start potty training. Its wide two steps and the dual height design (approx. 25 cm) helps the youngest of the family reach the sink to brush their teeth and wash their hands—an everyday tool also suitable for adults.

ANTI-SLIP: Made of sturdy plastic, the Straame double step stool has non-slip rubber inserts underneath every corner. It will ensure and add stability for your child and prevent sliding. The rubber textured and colourful surface enhances grip and safety.

KIDS BATHROOM HELPER: Perfect for everyday use, it can be used in any house room. With Straame Dual step stool, your children will grow in independence. They will be more prepared for the future—a boost for anyone who doesn't reach the higher areas of the bathroom, kitchen, and wardrobe.

STURDY DESIGN: Designed with parents in mind, the Straame step stool offers enhanced child safety and security solutions to reach high places. The surface provides good comfort and traction to prevent trips and falls. The built-in handles permit ease of transport and portability. It is lightweight enough for the kids to move around and gain responsibility by storing it when not in use.

PRACTICAL STEP STOOL: Our double step stool has a classically stylish design not to disturb the look of your home. A great helper for kids and adults. Easy to clean with a wet cloth and stackable for easy storage.
description: Product Description The Perfect Stool For: Use in Kitchen, Bathroom Brushing Teeth Washing Hands Potty Training Climbing Kitchen Countertop and Cabinets An unparalled way to encourage kids independence for all ages. Approximate Measurements are L37 x W33 x H25. Straame Double Step Stool The Straame Two-Step Stool will be useful for the entire family. You can start potty training your children so they can use the restroom independently. Kids will enjoy being more independent in many areas, from using the bathroom and brushing their teeth to helping out in the kitchen. On dry, spotless flooring, the toilet stool operates better. Your child will benefit from added stability and prevention of sliding. Specification: Wide step for extra secure feeling Soft Grip for Comfort and traction Built-in Handles, easy to carry Thick non-slip Rubber feet Anti-slip Surface No sharp ends Dual Height Design (about 25 cm) These devices are great for toddlers who can't otherwise reach the stream of water, but want to do everything themselves. Our Non-Slip Feet Designed Step Stool for toddlers and for use in the Bathroom or Kitchen & is easy to clean with a wet cloth and stackable for easy storage. Our stools are extremely practical and fashionable, and they are made to coordinate with any interior design scheme. The bathroom step stool for toddlers is quite practical and might change your kids' lives. The youngsters can use it in the kitchen, bathroom, close to the sink, on the counter, etc. Our double-step stool comes in of colors (Grey & White) and has a classically stylish design not to disturb the look of your home. A great helper for kids and adults. The approximate measurements are L37 x W33 x H25.
